channel.title: Maine Revised Statutes — List of Titles
channel.description: Static page whose single 'current through <date>' disclaimer sentence is the practical change signal; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

item.title: Monitoring started: Maine Revised Statutes — List of Titles
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
